ai_only_rows.comments: BofA (on Board's instruction) phoned Party A; Party A indicated interest in a possible business combination.
ai_only_rows.source_quote: On April 8, 2013, representatives of BofA Merrill Lynch, as instructed by the Board, telephoned a representative of Party A to discuss generally a possible business combination between Party A and Mac-Gray. During this call, the representative of Party A indicated that Party A might consider a business combination with Mac-Gray.

ai_only_rows.comments: Special Committee formally resolves to consider a sale of Mac-Gray and authorizes contacting 50 parties.
ai_only_rows.source_quote: In light of the factors discussed at this meeting, the Special Committee concluded that it would be in the best interests of stockholders to consider a potential sale of Mac-Gray and to review this alternative as compared to Mac-Gray's continuing as a stand-alone company and the risks and opportunities associated with execution of Mac-Gray's strategic business plan.

ai_only_rows.additional_note: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior bid on the 9/18 deadline.
ai_only_rows.source_quote: Party C did not submit a revised indication of interest or reiterate its prior indication of interest of an all-cash purchase price of $16.00 to $17.00 per share nor did it specify any reasons in connection therewith.
ai_only_rows.drop_reason_note: Party C self-withdrew at the informal final round by not submitting a revised indication of interest on the 9/18 deadline; no reasons specified.

ai_only_rows.additional_note: Implicit target cut: Special Committee authorized exclusivity with CSC/Pamplona on 9/23, effectively terminating Party A's participation in the informal round.
ai_only_rows.source_quote: After discussion, the Special Committee authorized Mac-Gray to enter into an exclusivity agreement providing for exclusive negotiations until 5 p.m. ET on October 12, 2013 on the terms included in the CSC/Pamplona final proposal and authorized the Transaction Committee and Goodwin Procter to continue negotiations with CSC/Pamplona based on guidance provided by the Special Committee at this meeting.

flags.reason: Filing does not explicitly narrate Party A being dropped; drop is implicit in the Special Committee's 9/23 authorization of exclusivity with CSC/Pamplona. Classified DropBelowInf per §I1 (target cut at informal round).

ai_only_rows.drop_reason_note: Target-initiated cut at the informal final round: Special Committee selected CSC/Pamplona for exclusivity, implicitly terminating Party A's participation.

ai_only_rows.additional_note: Mac-Gray archetype: target drops highest nominal bid ($21.50 Party B with options) in favor of CSC/Pamplona's $21.25 all-cash with deal certainty (no financing contingency + 100% capital commitment).
ai_only_rows.comments: Special Committee preferred CSC/Pamplona's $21.25 over Party B's $21.50-with-options because of execution risk (options vest on 5-yr projections; contingent value uncertain) and third-party debt financing (Party B had no firm commitment).
ai_only_rows.source_quote: the Special Committee concluded that the revised indication of interest submitted by CSC/Pamplona had the potential of delivering the most value to stockholders, provided greater certainty and involved less potential risk than the other indications.

flags.reason: Filing does not explicitly narrate Party B being dropped; drop is implicit in the Special Committee's 9/23 authorization of exclusivity with CSC/Pamplona. Classified DropBelowInf per §I1 (target cut at informal round).

ai_only_rows.drop_reason_note: Target-initiated cut at the informal final round: Special Committee selected CSC/Pamplona's $21.25 all-cash offer (greater certainty, Pamplona-funded) over Party B's nominal $21.50-with-options proposal (uncertain option value; no firm financing commitment). Mac-Gray archetype.

ai_rows.source_quote: On June 30, 2013, Party C entered into a confidentiality and standstill agreement with Mac-Gray and was provided with an informational package for the purpose of providing Party C with data to formulate a preliminary indication of interest.

flags.reason: Party C treated as financial bidder per page 38 enumeration ('18 financial bidders (including Party B and Party C)').

ai_rows.bid_date_rough: over the next two months (anchor: 2013-06-24 Special Committee decision + ~30 days midpoint)
ai_rows.additional_note: §E5 unnamed financial placeholder 1/16; filling exact-count 20 NDAs minus 4 named.
ai_rows.source_quote: Over the next two months a total of 20 potential bidders, including two strategic bidders (Party A and CSC/Pamplona) and 18 financial bidders (including Party B and Party C), entered into confidentiality agreements with Mac-Gray on a form provided by Mac-Gray, the terms of which were individually negotiated with potential bidders, but did not vary materially from the form provided.

flags.reason: 16 unnamed financial §E5 placeholders (Financial 1..16) filling the balance of the filing's exact 20-NDA count (2 named strategic: Party A, CSC/Pamplona consortium; 18 financial of which 2 named: Party B, Party C).
